summary: GAAIUS AI testing completed for new features: Collapsible sidebar, Audio mode UI with voice/language/duration controls, Auto-speak toggle, and multi-provider image generation. Backend 91.7% success (11/12 tests). Frontend 100% success - all requested features verified working.

critical.issue: All image providers failing - Pollinations timeout + HuggingFace token expired (401 Unauthorized)
critical.root_cause: HF_TOKEN in backend/.env is expired ('User Access Token emergent is expired'). Pollinations external API timing out.
critical.suggested_fix: Refresh HF_TOKEN in /app/backend/.env with a valid HuggingFace token

passed_tests: ✅ Sidebar collapse/expand button works - toggles between w-72 (expanded) and w-16 (collapsed)
✅ Sidebar collapse state persists in localStorage
✅ Audio mode UI shows Language dropdown (data-testid='audio-lang-select') with Auto-detect default
✅ Audio mode UI shows Voice dropdown (data-testid='audio-voice-select') with Default/Male/Female options
✅ Audio mode UI shows Duration dropdown (data-testid='audio-duration-select') with 30sec-5min options
✅ Auto-speak toggle button visible in Chat mode header (shows 'Voice Off'/'Voice On')
✅ Auto-speak toggle works correctly and persists state in localStorage
✅ Mode switching between chat/image/video/audio/file modes works
✅ Backend /api/health returns healthy status with groq=true, huggingface=true
✅ Chat API /api/chat works correctly with Groq Llama 3.3 70B
✅ Audio generation /api/audio/generate works with voice/language params
✅ Audio generation accepts 'auto' language (empty string for auto-detect)
failed_tests: ❌ Image generation /api/image/generate - 500 error (external provider issues, not code bug)
action_items: CRITICAL: Refresh HuggingFace token (HF_TOKEN) in /app/backend/.env - current token is expired
Consider adding error message in UI when image generation fails to inform user to retry
critical_code_review_comments: Image fallback logic in server.py lines 548-615 is correctly implemented (Pollinations → SDXL → FLUX)
AudioGenerationRequest model correctly accepts voice/language params (lines 128-133)
Sidebar collapse implementation correct with localStorage persistence
Auto-speak toggle correctly saves preference to localStorage

success_rate.backend: 91.7% (11/12 tests passed - 1 failure due to expired HF token)

seed_data_creation: Created test sessions during testing (TEST_Session, Test_Chat_Session, TEST_Delete_Session)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (collapsible sidebar, audio UI controls, auto-speak toggle) are implemented correctly and working. Image generation is failing due to expired HuggingFace token - this is a credential issue not a code issue. The fallback chain (Pollinations → HuggingFace SDXL → FLUX) is correctly implemented but all providers are failing due to token expiry and API timeouts.

image_generation_failure.root_cause: Multiple provider failures: 1) Pollinations API timeout (60s), 2) HuggingFace token expired (401 Unauthorized)
image_generation_failure.evidence: Backend logs show 'User Access Token emergent is expired' for both SDXL and FLUX models
image_generation_failure.mitigation: Regenerate HuggingFace access token at https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens and update HF_TOKEN in /app/backend/.env
